_comment: Sample custom content-filter (raiPolicy) spec for the BYOK model deployments. This example TIGHTENS filtering relative to Microsoft.DefaultV2 (lower severity thresholds, jailbreak + protected-material blocking on). Tightening is always allowed. Loosening (raising a threshold to High or disabling a category) requires an approved Azure OpenAI modified-content-filter application and the platform will reject it otherwise. Apply with scripts/configure-content-filter.ps1 -Apply (or .sh --apply). The _comment fields are ignored by the script (it only reads basePolicyName, mode, contentFilters).
